overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit downtown district at night. The character crosses streets and walks along wet sidewalks lined with trash bags, cherry blossom trees, and glowing advertisements, eventually passing under an overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit intersection with steam vents and cherry trees

events.description: crossing from the yellow-striped crosswalk onto the concrete sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking across the wide yellow crosswalk toward the sidewalk lined with pink cherry blossom trees

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes reflecting neon lights
industrial steam vent releasing white vapor onto the street
decorative trees with bright pink blossoms lining the sidewalk
large illuminated advertisements on building facades

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet downtown intersection at night, crossing a prominent yellow crosswalk. Steam rises from a vent on the left while pink cherry trees line the approaching sidewalk. The camera moves steadily forward, transitioning from the open street onto the concrete sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with trash accumulation and neon storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow sidewalk passing piles of trash bags and following a pedestrian in a gold jacket

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing a gold patterned jacket and red pants walking ahead of ego

entered.detail: accumulated garbage bags and debris stacked against the building wall
black metal barrier separating sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow sidewalk flanked by a building wall on the left and a metal railing on the right. Piles of trash bags line the left side while neon signs illuminate the wet pavement ahead. The camera follows a pedestrian in distinctive gold and red clothing.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial district with large corporate neon signage

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk approaching a major intersection with prominent neon signage and digital billboards

entered.detail: large cyan neon sign reading 'softsys' on a dark building facade
multiple illuminated advertising screens displaying colorful graphics

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into a wider commercial area dominated by a large cyan 'softsys' neon sign on the right. Digital billboards illuminate the wet street while the camera continues following the pedestrian ahead toward an upcoming intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with vehicle traffic and crosswalks

events.description: waiting for vehicles to pass then beginning to cross the intersection
turning slightly right while navigating across the wide intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide street at the intersection, navigating between moving vehicles and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: black sports car driving through the intersection with headlights on
white sedan approaching the intersection from the left

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with painted stripes across the multi-lane road
illuminated traffic signals suspended over the intersection

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide intersection as the character steps onto the crosswalk. Vehicles including a black sports car navigate the crossing while traffic lights hang overhead. The camera turns slightly right while crossing, with buildings and billboards now visible on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under overpass with food vendor signs

events.description: entering the covered area beneath the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking under the concrete overpass into a more enclosed space with overhead cover and vendor signage

entered.detail: large concrete overpass creating a covered roof over the walkway
red neon sign reading 'BURRITO' mounted on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a semi-covered walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass. A prominent red 'BURRITO' neon sign appears on the left as the environment becomes more enclosed. The wet pavement continues to reflect the surrounding neon lights in the sheltered space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit downtown district that transitions from open intersections to a sheltered urban underpass. It begins by crossing a yellow crosswalk amidst rising steam and pink cherry trees before moving onto a narrow concrete sidewalk lined with trash bags and glowing signs. As the camera follows a pedestrian in gold and red clothing, the environment expands into a wider commercial area dominated by a large cyan softsys sign and bright digital billboards. The scene then opens into another wide intersection where the camera navigates through traffic and black sports cars before turning slightly toward the surrounding buildings. Finally, the movement leads into a semi-covered walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass, where the wet pavement reflects the glow of a prominent red burrito sign.
